therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.name: drug_load
therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.responsibility: payload encapsulation + release kinetics (lipid-shell or polymer-cage drug compartmentalisation, k_release_s_inv, payload_mass_amu)

therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.name: immune_evasion
therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.responsibility: complement-cascade evasion + opsonization shielding (peg-corona density, c3b-deposition rate, macrophage_clearance_t_half_h)

therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.name: biodistribution
therapeutic_nanobot_l7_to_l9_layers.responsibility: tissue-targeting kinetics + clearance pathway selection (organ_uptake_percent_id_per_g, renal_vs_hepatic_clearance_ratio, target_tissue_residence_time_h)

collision_overlap_target.rationale: L0-L6 (single-molecule architectural primitive: vertex topology, n6 invariant lattice, Brownian floor, Stokes-Langevin, Markov motor cycle, J2 pose canonicalization, per-cycle work) and L7-L9 (clinical-application system: drug payload/coating, complement evasion/opsonization, biodistribution/clearance/targeting) are intentionally string-disjoint at the canonical-primitive label level.

raw_91_c3_disclose: Stub handoff — boundary acknowledgment only. (1) This JSON declares the L7-L9 primitive enumeration so hexa-bio's nanobot_n_r2_boundary_audit.py can compute collision_overlap_ratio = 0 (full disjointness). (2) NO wet-lab integration, NO IP/contract review, NO joint design exists yet — those are explicitly DEFERRED to cycle 30+. (3) Acceptance schema raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_acceptance_v1 is declared here in canonical repo but the consuming witness contracts (raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_drug_load_v1, _l8_immune_evasion_v1, _l9_biodistribution_v1) are placeholder names — actual schema files do not yet exist in either repo. (4) collision_overlap_target=0.0 is a definitional disjointness claim, not an experimentally measured quantity; it holds because the string labels were chosen to be disjoint. (5) F-NB-5 PASS via this handoff certifies architectural-axis non-collision only, not therapeutic efficacy or clinical co-design.
raw_47_cross_repo: Canonical-side declaration; hexa-bio side reads READ-ONLY via _python_bridge/module/nanobot_n_r2_boundary_audit.py per .roadmap.nanobot N-R2 line 38. No reverse dependency: this canonical JSON does not import or read hexa-bio state.
